items.title: Spain's Williams on injury: One of my worst days
items.summary: Spain winger Nico Williams said he had suffered "one of the worst days of my life" after an injury against Uruguay on Friday jeopardized his future participation in the World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Prize money 'better,' but protests might continue
items.summary: Though shares of revenues are "getting better," several players suggest ongoing protests over their cut of tournament prize money could extend to the US Open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Trinidad Chambliss Disputes Lane Kiffin's Narrative on Black Recruits at Ole Miss
items.summary: Mississippi quarterback Trinidad Chambliss took issue with LSU coach Lane Kiffin's recent comments that Ole Miss' past embrace of Confederate symbols made recruiting Black playe...
